title: Oil gains after OPEC reaffirms supply cutbacks
section_path: Oil gains after OPEC reaffirms supply cutbacks
section_path_text: Oil gains after OPEC reaffirms supply cutbacks
summary:
Main
Markets remained buoyed by signs of stronger economic growth. Supply side issues were also supportive. This saw drawdowns from inventories across metals and energy.
